description:
Convert your music to any format

MediaHuman Audio Converter is a free application for macOS and Windows. With it you can convert music in formats like MP3, AAC, WMA, OGG, etc. as well as in lossless formats like FLAC, Apple Lossless, AIFF, WAV (up to 32 bit).
- fixed MP3 joint stereo mode not working (always produced regular stereo)
- fixed OGG/Opus tag duplication when converting between same formats
- fixed normalization causing conversion errors
- fixed custom profile losing advanced arguments on save
- [mac] fixed 'delete source file' not working on modern macOS
- [mac] improved iTunes/Music.app integration for macOS Sequoia and later
- updated audio codecs and tag processing libraries to latest versions
- minor improvements for stability
